zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Hawthorne於1485年出生在英國越可爾奧文登時，她的父親Sir John Hawthorne18歲，母親Anne De Verdun15歲。她於1515年與Thomas Hall VI結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她於1488年住在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 詹姆斯 加利可。她去世於1543年10月6日在英國素可瓦恩哈姆享年58歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Hawthorne于1485年出生在英国越可爾奧文登时，她的父亲Sir John Hawthorne18岁，母亲Anne De Verdun15岁。她于1515年与Thomas Hall VI结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她于1488年住在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 詹姆斯 加利可。她去世于1543年10月6日在英国素可瓦恩哈姆享年58岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Hawthorne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hawthorne (Hill) in Bray (Berkshire), an altered form of Hothorne, earlier Horethorn (Old English hār + thorn ‘boundary thorn(-tree)’. A common variant of the surname in 17th-century Bray and neighboring Binfield was Hathorne .
English (Gloucestershire): topographic name for someone who lived by a hawthorn tree (Middle English hawthorn).

English (Staffordshire): variant of Hordern, a habitational name from Hordern (in Rainow, Cheshire), Horderns in Chapel en le Frith (Derbyshire), Hordron in Langsett (Yorkshire), Little Hordern in Bolton le Moors (Lancashire), and perhaps from Hardhorn in Poulton le Fylde (Lancashire). All the placenames derive from Old English hord-ærn ‘storehouse’. By the early 17th century the surname had arrived in Staffordshire, where it was sometimes re-interpeted as Hawthorne.

variants.name: Hathorn
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): variant of   Hawthorne  .

variants.name: Hawthorn

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Hawthorne was born in 1485, in Ovenden, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir John Hawthorne, was 18 and her mother, Anne De Verdun, was 15. She married Thomas Hall VI in 1515. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She lived in London St James Garlickhithe, Middlesex, England in 1488. She died on 6 October 1543, in Warnham, Sussex, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in London, England.

fr.London St James Garlickhithe, Middlesex,: London St James Garlickhithe, Middlesex, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Hawthorne est née en 1485, à Ovenden, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Hawthorne, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Anne De Verdun, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Hall VI en 1515. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle a vécu à London St James Garlickhithe, Middlesex, Angleterre en 1488. Elle est décédée le 6 octobre 1543, à Warnham, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Hawthorne 1485 in Ovenden, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Hawthorne 18 und ihre Mutter Anne De Verdun 15. Sie hat 1515 Thomas Hall VI geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1488 hat sie in London St James Garlickhithe, Middlesex, England gelebt. Sie starb am 6. Oktober 1543 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Warnham, Sussex, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Hawthorneが1485年にイギリスヨークシュアイアオベンデンで生まれた時，父Sir John Hawthorneは18歳，母Anne De Verdunは15歳であった。1515年にThomas Hall VIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1488年にはイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ジャムス ガーリックヒスに住んでいた。彼女は1543年10月6日にイギリススセックスワーンハムで58歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.London St James Garlickhithe, Middlesex,: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 자메스 가릭히테
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Hawthorne(이)가 1485년 영국 요르크실르 븐든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Hawthorne(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne De Verdun(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1515년 Thomas Hall VI(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1488년도에 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 자메스 가릭히테에서 살았다. 그녀는 1543년 10월 6일 영국 수세스 워함에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Hawthorne nasceu em 1485, em Ovenden, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Hawthorne, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Anne De Verdun, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Hall VI em 1515. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela viveu em London St James Garlickhithe, Middlesex, Inglaterra em 1488. Ela faleceu em 6 de outubro de 1543, em Warnham, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra.

ru.London St James Garlickhithe, Middlesex,: лондон ст джемесь гарликкхит, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Hawthorne родилась в 1485 г. в местности овенден, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Hawthorne было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne De Verdun, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Hall VI в 1515 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она жила в местности лондон ст джемесь гарликкхит, миддлесекс, Англия в 1488 году. Она умерла 6 октября 1543 г. в местности варнам, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия.

Se casó con Thomas Hall VI en 1515. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en London St James Garlickhithe, Middlesex, Inglaterra en 1488. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1543, en Warnham, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en London, Inglaterra.
